summary: Tested the new /lp marketing landing page: backend waitlist endpoints + frontend landing flow (audit demo, waitlist submission, navigation, portal isolation). All 6 pytest cases and all frontend e2e checks passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Email validation in WaitlistEntry uses plain `str` — consider EmailStr from pydantic for stronger validation (currently any string with '@...' passes; even malformed emails like 'foo' would be rejected only because of empty check in UI). Optional improvement.
GET /api/waitlist/count baseline offset (247) is hardcoded inside the route; if product wants to tune social-proof later, move to env/config.
No deduplication on waitlist — same email can submit multiple times. Not a bug per spec but worth noting for spam protection.
Landing.jsx is 438 lines — acceptable but approaching the 700-line guideline; AuditDemo and WaitlistForm could be split into separate files for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created test waitlist rows prefixed with TEST_ (TEST_Min User, TEST_Full User, TEST_Counter, TEST_E2E Anna). They live in db.waitlist. No cleanup endpoint exists; rows are harmless social-proof counts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_1 already covered portal flows (Pulpit, Wzmianki, AI Feed, Klienci). Iteration_2 covers only the /lp landing + waitlist endpoints. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_waitlist.py for regression. Landing test selectors: data-testid=landing-page, audit-biz/city/run/verdict, wf-name/email/biz/city/role-{owner,investor,other}/submit, waitlist-success. Portal isolation verified: sidebar/topbar/palette-switcher absent on /lp.
verified_flows: /lp loads Landing without portal chrome (no sidebar, no topbar, no palette switcher)
All 5 nav links present (Problem, Jak działa, Produkt, Dla inwestorów, Zaloguj się)
Hero shows 'Klient już nie googluje' + 4 phone-cards
Audit demo: fill biz+city, run, verdict 0/4 appears after ~3.8s
Waitlist form full flow -> waitlist-success 'Jesteś na liście.'
Counter 'Dołączyło już X osób' visible on form
Click 'Zaloguj się →' navigates to / and portal Shell (sidebar) renders
